question: Which movies released in 1998 have reviews expressing an overall negative, critical, or strongly unfavorable opinion of the movie?
semantic_question: Does this review express an overall negative, critical, or strongly unfavorable opinion of the movie?
suql_query: SELECT movie_id, title, year, runtime, director, genres FROM movies WHERE year = 1998 AND answer(review, 'Does this review express an overall negative, critical, or strongly unfavorable opinion of the movie?') = 'Yes';
data_policy: one manually annotated review per unique movie_id
